name: notate-excalidraw-workspace
description: Cross-platform viewer / converter / editor for notate (.notate) files via Excalidraw

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@notate/codec && npm run build --workspace=@notate/excalidraw
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=@notate/codec && npm run test --workspace=@notate/excalidraw
